languages.text: Эта метка свидетельствует: века назад Себериан высадился в другой части колоссального зала.
This mark shows that centuries ago, Seberian landed in another part of the colossal hall.
languages.original_text: Эта метка свидетельствует: века назад Себериан высадился в другой части колоссального зала.

traits.locale_text: This mark shows that centuries ago, Seberian landed in another part of the colossal hall.

This mark shows that centuries ago, Seberian landed in another part of the colossal hall.

languages.text: 这个标记表明，数个世纪前，塞贝里安曾抵达这座宏伟大厅的另一片区域。
languages.original_text: This mark shows that centuries ago, Seberian landed in another part of the colossal hall.

traits.locale_text: 这个标记表明，数个世纪前，塞贝里安曾抵达这座宏伟大厅的另一片区域。

languages.text: La marca indica que hace siglos Seberian aterrizó en otra parte del colosal salón.
languages.original_text: This mark shows that centuries ago, Seberian landed in another part of the colossal hall.

traits.locale_text: La marca indica que hace siglos Seberian aterrizó en otra parte del colosal salón.

languages.text: Cette marque prouve qu'il y a des siècles, Seberian a atterri quelque part dans l'immensité du hall.
languages.original_text: This mark shows that centuries ago, Seberian landed in another part of the colossal hall.

traits.locale_text: Cette marque prouve qu'il y a des siècles, Seberian a atterri quelque part dans l'immensité du hall.

languages.text: Bu işaret, Seberian'ın yüzyıllar önce devasa salonun başka bir yerine indiğini gösteriyor.
languages.original_text: This mark shows that centuries ago, Seberian landed in another part of the colossal hall.

traits.locale_text: Bu işaret, Seberian'ın yüzyıllar önce devasa salonun başka bir yerine indiğini gösteriyor.

languages.text: Diese Markierung zeigt, dass Seberian vor Hunderten von Jahren in einem anderen Teil der kolossalen Halle gelandet ist.
languages.original_text: This mark shows that centuries ago, Seberian landed in another part of the colossal hall.

traits.locale_text: Diese Markierung zeigt, dass Seberian vor Hunderten von Jahren in einem anderen Teil der kolossalen Halle gelandet ist.

languages.text: このマークは、何世紀も前に、シベリア人がこの巨大な大広間の別の場所に上陸したことを示しています。
languages.original_text: This mark shows that centuries ago, Seberian landed in another part of the colossal hall.

traits.locale_text: このマークは、何世紀も前に、シベリア人がこの巨大な大広間の別の場所に上陸したことを示しています。
